antithesis_summary: Trade some early speed for cleaner convergence with lower Adam rates, a slightly lower Muon LR, and a short warmup.
label: Aggression vs stability
thesis_summary: Keep the aggressive short-horizon optimizer settings because the harness rewards early movement and the first run should avoid extra confounders.
why_active: The plain baseline keeps the same no-warmup, high-LR sprint schedule, but a simpler model may want a different optimizer temperament than the historical value-embedding winner. This remains unresolved until the branch has one clean unchanged baseline run.
